'''Wallanooga''' the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]], also known as both '''Walla''' and '''Nooga''', was one of the most powerful arms dealers in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] until his [[Death/Legends|death]]. He and his partner, [[Dreddon]], based their operations on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] and did their dealing with all sorts of people, from [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] to [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]].

Aside from his arms-dealing enterprises, Wallanooga had extensive business interests in the Outer Rim [[Slavery/Legends|slave trade]], He was also the Hutt to see for those looking to hire top-quality [[Assassin/Legends|assassins]]. He favored and most enjoyed working with the [[Anzat (species)|Anzati]], finding their innate cruelty admirable and almost Hutt-like.

The [[Sennex]] pirates sold [[Aurra Sing/Legends|Aurra Sing]] to Wallanooga, who had hopes of turning the girl into his own [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] assassin. He apprenticed her to the Anzati not long after he bought her. Wallanooga was killed by Aurra Sing sometime before [[36 BBY/Legends|36 BBY]] when he failed to meet a deal with her.<ref name="WizardsCite-Behind the Cards: Aurra Sing">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=swtcg/article/charactersaurrasing|text=Behind the Cards: Aurra Sing}}</ref>
